title: milium effusum subsp. schmidtianum
intro: Milium effusum subsp. schmidtianum, also known as meadow millet grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of meadow millet grass include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. Meadow millet grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
